title: ekimia glauca
intro: Ekimia glauca, a native plant species found in the subtropical regions of Australia and New Caledonia, is a type of shrub belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ekimia glauca include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often extracted through steam distillation and used in aromatherapy, topical applications, and as a natural remedy for digestive issues.
